subject: Re: RIB Enquiry
body:
speed and enclosure?

----- Original Message ----
From: Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, January 2, 2007 11:16:44 AM
Subject: FW: RIB Enquiry

I spoke with a representative from the MST
and here are some initial images (nothing note worthy) and PDF files with drawings.
 

  
 

There is some information in the below e
mail that I received from them that will give you an idea of what they offer.
 

  
 

But basically they can design anything to
your specification.
 

  
 



Emad
 Hanna
 

Project Controller
 

NES, LLC
 



457 Madison Ave
 

New York,
 NY 10022
 

'   (212) 891-6414
 

Fax (212) 750-2408
 

› ehanna@nysgmail.com
 

 
 













From: Ben Kerfoot
[mailto:bkerfoot@mstltd.com] 

Sent: Tuesday, January 02, 2007
10:51 AM

To: Emad
 Hanna

Cc: Philip Hilbert

Subject: RIB Enquiry
 




  
 



Emad    
 






 
 






 
 






Please see attached a few drawings etc. to give you an
idea of our T1100 RIB hull.  This craft is based on a successful Pro V
Cougar racing twin stepped monohull called the 'Thunderboat' which has been
proven at speeds in excess of 100Kts.
 






 
 






Whilst the model shown is rather military we can offer a
custom finish with teak decks, bow seating modules,  cool lockers,
suspension seating etc.  I have attached a few images to give
you an idea of the level of customisation available.
 






 
 






Generally speaking we would be looking at a price of around
$200K to $250K, depending on the level of customisation,  for an 11m
version with twin 300HP 4-Stroke outboards.  Delivery would be 12-14 weeks
from placement of order to ex works UK 
and we do have a number of shipments leaving Liverpool late spring bound for
the Caribbean which we could add this to.
 






 
 






In the meantime if you would like to offer any suggestions
as to how you might like your new craft configured we would be happy
to put a full proposal together for you.
 






 
 






Many Thanks
 






Kind Regards
 






 
 






Ben Kerfoot
 




 
 

 
 


 

Unit 1, Atlantic Way
 

Brunswick Business 
 Park
 

Liverpool
 

L3 4BE
 

United Kingdom
 

Tel: +44 (0) 151 708 4112
 

Fax: +44 (0) 151 708 4113
 

Web: www.mstltd.com
 

Email: sales@mstltd.com

speed and enclosure?

----- Original Message ----
From: Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, January 2, 2007 11:16:44 AM
Subject: FW: RIB Enquiry

I spoke with a representative from the MST and here are some initial images (nothing note worthy) and PDF files with drawings.

 

There is some information in the below e mail that I received from them that will give you an idea of what they offer.

 

But basically they can design anything to your specification.

 

Emad Hanna

457 Madison Ave

From: Ben Kerfoot [mailto:bkerfoot@mstltd.com]
Sent: Tuesday, January 02, 2007 10:51 AM
To: Emad Hanna
Cc: Philip Hilbert
Subject: RIB Enquiry

 

Emad   

 

 

Please see attached a few drawings etc. to give you an idea of our T1100 RIB hull.  This craft is based on a successful Pro V Cougar racing twin stepped monohull called the 'Thunderboat' which has been proven at speeds in excess of 100Kts.

 

Whilst the model shown is rather military we can offer a custom finish with teak decks, bow seating modules,  cool lockers, suspension seating etc.  I have attached a few images to give you an idea of the level of customisation available.

 

Generally speaking we would be looking at a price of around $200K to $250K, depending on the level of customisation,  for an 11m version with twin 300HP 4-Stroke outboards.  Delivery would be 12-14 weeks from placement of order to ex works UK and we do have a number of shipments leaving Liverpool late spring bound for the Caribbean which we could add this to.

 

In the meantime if you would like to offer any suggestions as to how you might like your new craft configured we would be happy to put a full proposal together for you.

 

Many Thanks

Kind Regards

 

Ben Kerfoot

 

 

Unit 1, Atlantic Way

Brunswick Business Park

Liverpool

L3 4BE

United Kingdom
